vocabulary.definition: The total area of all the faces (outer surfaces) of a three-dimensional figure
vocabulary.visual: Add up the area of every face

vocabulary.definition: A 3D shape with six rectangular faces
vocabulary.visual: A box shape — length, width, height

vocabulary.definition: A 3D shape with two triangular bases and three rectangular faces
A flat surface of a three-dimensional figure
vocabulary.visual: Each flat side of a prism

launch.narrative: Your class is painting the outside of different time capsule shapes to protect them from weather. Some capsules are rectangular prisms and others are triangular prisms (wedge-shaped). To buy the right amount of paint, you need to calculate the surface area of each shape!
launch.contextImage: Students painting rectangular and triangular prism time capsule containers in bright colors
noticePrompts: How many faces does a rectangular prism have? A triangular prism?
What shapes make up the faces of a triangular prism?
How is finding surface area different from finding volume?
wonderPrompts: Which shape uses more paint — a rectangular or triangular prism of similar size?
Why does surface area use square units instead of cubic units?

explore.instructions: Calculate the surface area of each time capsule shape. For rectangular prisms, use SA = 2lw + 2lh + 2wh. For triangular prisms, find the area of each face and add them up.

discourse.prompt: Compare Capsule A (rectangular, SA = 248 in²) and Capsule C (triangular, SA = 184 in²). Even though they are similar in size, why does the rectangular prism need more paint?
discourse.sentenceFrame: The rectangular prism has ___ faces while the triangular prism has ___ faces. The rectangular prism's SA is ___ in² which is ___ more than the triangular prism's ___ in² because ___.

approaching.stem: What is the surface area of a rectangular prism with l = 5 cm, w = 4 cm, h = 3 cm?
A triangular prism has two triangular bases each with area 12 cm² and three rectangular faces with areas 30 cm², 40 cm², and 40 cm². What is the total surface area?

onLevel.instructions: Calculate the surface area of each rectangular prism time capsule.

onLevel.stem: A triangular prism has triangular bases with base 6 in and height 4 in. The prism is 10 in long and the two slant sides of the triangle are each 5 in. What is the surface area?
onLevel.explanation: Triangular bases: 2 × (½ × 6 × 4) = 24 in². Three rectangular faces: 6(10) + 5(10) + 5(10) = 60 + 50 + 50 = 160 in². SA = 24 + 160 = 184 in².

extending.title: Find the Surface Area Error

workedExample.label: Dimensions
workedExample.work: Rectangular prism: l = 12 cm, w = 7 cm, h = 5 cm

extending.correctWork: The student forgot to multiply 7 × 5 by 2. It should be 2(7×5) = 2(35) = 70, not 35. Correct: SA = 168 + 120 + 70 = 358 cm².
hints: Check Step 3: did the student multiply every face pair by 2?
2(7×5) = 2(35) = 70, not 35. The student forgot the '2' on the last pair.

connect.scenario: A carpenter builds wooden storage chests. A rectangular chest is 3 feet long, 2 feet wide, and 2 feet tall. Wood stain covers 50 square feet per can.
connect.promptQuestion: How much surface area needs staining, and how many cans of stain are needed?

exitTicket.stem: A rectangular prism has l = 8 ft, w = 6 ft, h = 3 ft. What is the surface area?
exitTicket.explanation: SA = 2(8×6) + 2(8×3) + 2(6×3) = 96 + 48 + 36 = 180 ft². Surface area uses square units (ft²).
